ddls:
CREATE TABLE "visitors" (
  "visitor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visitor */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the visitor */,
  "is_known" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the visitor is known or unknown */,
  "first_visit" TEXT /* Timestamp of the visitor's first visit */,
  "last_visit" TEXT /* Timestamp of the visitor's last visit */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the visitor */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the visitor */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the visitor's browser */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile, tablet) */,
  "referral_source" TEXT /* Source from which the visitor was referred (e.g., search engine, social media, direct) */,
  "session_count" INTEGER /* Total number of sessions the visitor has had */,
  "total_duration" INTEGER /* Total duration of all sessions combined */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visitor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visitors_user_agent FOREIGN KEY ("user_agent") REFERENCES user_agents ("user_agent_string"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visitors_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visitors_city FOREIGN KEY ("city") REFERENCES cities ("city_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit */,
  "visitor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visitor who made the visit */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the visit */,
  "pages_visited" INTEGER /* Number of pages visited during the visit */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Total number of hits during the visit */,
  "bandwidth_consumed" REAL /* Total bandwidth consumed during the visit in MB */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used during the visit */,
  "referral_source" TEXT /* Source from which the visit was referred */,
  "user_agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user agent used during the visit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visits_visitor_id FOREIGN KEY ("visitor_id") REFERENCES visitors ("visitor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visits_user_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_agent_id") REFERENCES user_agents ("user_agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pages" (
  "page_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each page */,
  "page_url" TEXT /* URL of the page */,
  "page_title" TEXT /* Title of the page */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time the page was last modified */,
  "visit_count" INTEGER /* Total number of visits to the page */,
  "hit_count" INTEGER /* Total number of hits on the page */,
  "bandwidth_consumed" REAL /* Total bandwidth consumed by visits to the page in MB */,
  "page_type" TEXT /* Type of page (e.g., product, blog, about) */,
  "page_content_size" INTEGER /* Size of the page content in bytes */,
  "average_load_time" INTEGER /* Average load time of the page in milliseconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("page_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "page_visits" (
  "page_visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each page visit */,
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visit */,
  "page_id" INTEGER /* ID of the page visited */,
  "visit_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the page visit */,
  "hit_count" INTEGER /* Number of hits on the page during the visit */,
  "bandwidth_consumed" REAL /* Bandwidth consumed by the page visit in MB */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "page_load_time" INTEGER /* Load time of the page during the visit in milliseconds */,
  "interaction_count" INTEGER /* Number of interactions (e.g., clicks, scrolls) on the page during the visit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("page_visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_page_visits_page_id FOREIGN KEY ("page_id") REFERENCES pages ("page_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_page_visits_visit_id FOREIGN KEY ("visit_id") REFERENCES visits ("visit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_agents" (
  "user_agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user agent */,
  "user_agent_string" TEXT /* User agent string */,
  "browser_name" TEXT /* Name of the browser */,
  "browser_version" TEXT /* Version of the browser */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system of the visitor */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., desktop, mobile, tablet) */,
  "is_bot" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user agent is a bot */,
  "last_seen" TEXT /* Last seen timestamp for the user agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2) */,
  "visitor_count" INTEGER /* Total number of visitors from the country */,
  "total_bandwidth_consumed" REAL /* Total bandwidth consumed by visitors from the country in MB */,
  "total_sessions" INTEGER /* Total number of sessions from the country */,
  "average_session_duration" INTEGER /* Average duration of sessions from the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the city is in */,
  "visitor_count" INTEGER /* Total number of visitors from the city */,
  "total_bandwidth_consumed" REAL /* Total bandwidth consumed by visitors from the city in MB */,
  "total_sessions" INTEGER /* Total number of sessions from the city */,
  "average_session_duration" INTEGER /* Average duration of sessions from the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, data analyst, marketing) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Date and time of the last password change */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "last_failed_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last failed login attempt */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
